failure.symptom: frappe/books is an Electron desktop app (dev script runs Electron + Vite on port 6969). POS functionality requires Electron native APIs + SQLite database. Vite renderer alone returns HTTP 000 — app cannot run in a standalone browser.
attempted: npx vite --port 5173 直接启动 renderer（HTTP 000，页面无法加载）
failure.recommendation: 跳过，Electron 桌面应用需要原生运行时环境，无法纯浏览器测试
